COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOLLIS, STEPHEN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $737.98 FILED BY HOLLIS, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCANINI, KEN DBA TOSCALITO TIRE AND AUTOMOTIVE IPPOLITO, VINCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR 10240 SYSTEMS PARKWAY, SACRAMENTO, CA 95827

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLLIS, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOSCANINI, KEN DBA TOSCALITO TIRE AND AUTOMOTIVE IPPOLITO, VINCE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT NEGLIGENTLY REPAIRED HIS VEHICLE. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF DID NOT GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO REPAIR THE PROBLEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
